M
Meta Go
FeaturesPricingDemoDocs
Connect
Meta Go
FeaturesPricingDemoDocs
Meta GoAPI Reference

API Reference

Protocol-grade REST endpoints powering the Meta Go IDaaS layer.

Architecture

REST + JSON

Auth

SIWE + Session Cookie

Rate Limit

5 req/min · relay

Base URL

https://soulbound-identity.preview.emergentagent.com/api

Endpoints

12 routes
GET
/api/auth/nonce

Issues an EIP-4361 SIWE nonce for wallet sign-in.

POST
/api/auth/verify

Verifies SIWE signature, establishes encrypted session cookie.

POST
/api/user/sync

Persists forged identity (DID, ZK proof, voice hash) to backend.

GET
/api/user/me

Returns the current authenticated user profile.

POST
/api/verify-proof

Server-side Groth16 zk-SNARK structural verification.

POST
/api/relay

EIP-712 gasless relay with nullifier replay protection (5/min).

POST
/api/credentials/verify

Validates an imported Verifiable Credential JSON.

GET
/api/sbts/{address}

Returns Soulbound Tokens owned by a wallet.

GET
/api/did/resolve/{did}

W3C-compliant DID document resolver (federated).

GET
/api/did/cross-chain/{address}

Cross-EVM identity attestation status.

POST
/api/billing/checkout

Creates a subscription checkout session.

GET
/api/billing/plans

Lists IDaaS subscription tiers.
